title: 3-Pack - Essentials Baking Oven Sheet Set 32cm - Easy Cleaning Baking Tray/Pan, Non-Stick Tin, Multi-Pack Set Oven Trays - Dishwasher Safe and Easy Clean
features: NON STICK BAKING TRAYS - These baking trays are finished with a non-stick coating which means it's easy to clean once you're done baking or cooking. Remember not to use any abrasive or metal scourers as these can damage the coating.
DISHWASHER SAFE - These oven baking trays are dishwasher safe; allowing you to make the job of cleaning much easier and pain-free.
DIMENSIONS - 32cm x 22cm x 1cm - these are approximate external measurements from edge to edge. They are slim in design and cab easily be stacked to save space in your kitchen.
OVEN SAFE TEMPERATURES - This pack of oven trays are suitable for use up to 230C / 450F / Gas Mark 8.
VARIETY OF USES - These baking trays can be used around the kitchen, for instance as a chip pan, small roasting tin and for cooking small pizzas. You may also use it as a baking sheet if appropriate.
